437 M0900C_HEALD_STG_3_ULCR_NUM M0900C_HEALD_STG_3_ULCR_NUM M0900C Healed Stage 3 Pressure Ulcer Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of Stage 3 pressure ulcers present on the prior assessment (OBRA, or Scheduled PPS) that have completely closed (resurfaced with epithelium). discontinued 9/30/2018
